description_long: This is a modern, freestanding refrigerator with a side-by-side door configuration, featuring a dark gray exterior and a lighter interior. The left door is equipped with a built-in water and ice dispenser, complete with a small digital control panel above the dispenser area. The right door, which is open, reveals multiple transparent shelves and bins for organized storage. The refrigerator has a prominent, curved handle on the right door, which is protruding and easy to grip. The back of the unit displays several access panels and ventilation grilles, indicating areas for maintenance and airflow. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for placement in urban garages, kitchens, or communal spaces.
description: A sleek, side-by-side refrigerator with a dark gray exterior, built-in water/ice dispenser, and a protruding curved handle. The open door reveals multiple transparent shelves and bins inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open right door, interior shelves, bins, and the water/ice dispenser with a control panel on the left door.
description_view_1: Left side view with the right door partially open, showing the plain, solid side panel and the edge of the open door.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying access panels, ventilation grilles, and the back of the refrigerator, with the right door handle visible from the side.
description_view_3: Right side view with the open door and visible interior shelves, showing the depth and storage compartments inside.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding, curved handle mounted vertically on the right door, easy to grip and visually distinct.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular ventilation grilles with horizontal slats located on the lower rear panel.
